testcase.name: Global: percentage of failed events is 0.0
testcase.system-out: Global: percentage of failed events is 0.0

testcase.name: Global: 95th percentile of response time is less than or equal to 100.0
testcase.system-out: Global: 95th percentile of response time is less than or equal to 100.0

testcase.name: Global: 99th percentile of response time is less than or equal to 150.0
testcase.system-out: Global: 99th percentile of response time is less than or equal to 150.0

testcase.name: Global: mean of response time is less than or equal to 50.0
testcase.system-out: Global: mean of response time is less than or equal to 50.0
